sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n84388" key="po/kes" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">πόκες</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">αἱ</gen>, and <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">πόκη</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen>, <sense id="n84388.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <xr opt="n" TEIform="xr"> <lbl opt="n" TEIform="lbl">v.</lbl> <ref targOrder="U" lang="greek" TEIform="ref">πόκος</ref> </xr> <bibl n="http://www.trismegistos.org/text/13080" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">11</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
